{{Quote|Win or lose is hardly the issue. The disregard of rules, the presumption of an individual who placed his impulses above the collective wisdom of tradition and clan, this we cannot allow.|Gimald Nuruodo to Jagged Fel|<ref name="RSBF" />}}
'''Gimald Nuruodo''' was a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] flight instructor and military officer. He believed very strongly in tradition and loyalty to the group.<ref name="RSBF" />

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]],<ref name="DeathDate" /> Gimald served as a flight instructor and a [[Commandant/Legends|commandant]] at the Chiss [[Syndic Mitth'raw'nuruodo training academy|military academy]] in the [[Rata Nebula/Legends|Rata Nebula]]. Given the status of that academy and his displays of respect for [[Kres'ten'tarthi]], he may have been working with the [[Empire of the Hand]].<ref name="RSBF" />

He was killed leading the cadets to their [[Nssis-class Clawcraft|clawcraft]] in the [[Battle of Rhigar|attack]] on the academy by the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]].<ref name="RSBF" />
